texto: Gratitude without practicing maybe like practicing a faith without good work. A grateful heart is not enough without a grateful habit
autor: because your joy is not produced by what you put in your heart but by habit you put in your life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a because your joy is not produced by what you put in your heart but by habit you put in your life.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Gratitude without practicing maybe like practicing a faith without good work. A grateful heart is…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, patience-johnson, why-does-an-orderly-god-allow-disorder pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e why-does-an-orderly-god-allow-disorder.
